title: Add defcustom and hook variable
description: Add emacs-mcp-allowed-project-directories defcustom and emacs-mcp-project-dir-changed-hook to emacs-mcp.el

title: Implement project directory validation
description: Add emacs-mcp--validate-project-dir to emacs-mcp-session.el implementing FR-3 validation rules

title: Modify initialize handler for per-session projectDir
description: Modify emacs-mcp--handle-initialize to accept optional projectDir in params (FR-1)

title: Add setProjectDir handler
description: Add emacs-mcp--handle-set-project-dir and register emacs-mcp/setProjectDir method (FR-2)

title: Add deferred context variable
description: Add emacs-mcp--current-project-dir dynamic variable and bind in dispatch-tool

title: Write validation tests
description: Add ERT tests for emacs-mcp--validate-project-dir to test-session.el

title: Write protocol tests
description: Add ERT tests for initialize-with-projectDir and setProjectDir to test-protocol.el

title: Byte-compile and checkdoc verification
description: Verify all modified files byte-compile cleanly and pass checkdoc (AC-7)
